name: Kitex Garments Limited
summary: Kitex Garments Limited manufactures and sells fabric and readymade garments in India. It primarily offers infant wear comprising body suits, rompters, bibs, burps, sleepwear, and training pants. The company also exports its products to the United States and Europe. Kitex Garments Limited was founded in 1992 and is based in Kochi, India.
